hooks.command: [ "$CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE" = "true" ] && { [ -x ~/.claude/scripts/setup-nix-web.sh ] && ~/.claude/scripts/setup-nix-web.sh >/dev/null || { t=$(mktemp) && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kumewata/dotfiles/main/setup-nix-web.sh -o "$t" && bash "$t" >/dev/null; rm -f "$t"; }; } || echo '[setup-nix-web] hook failed' >&2
